Microlicia is a genus of flowering plants in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the melastome or tropical sutured flower. The health benefits of Microlicia species are attributed to their antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help in reducing oxidative stress and inflammation.
